name: Chocolate-Amareto Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the chocolate wafers over the bottom of a 7-inch springform pan. Set aside.
2. Position the knife blade in the food processor bowl. Add the cream cheese and all other ingredients except for the egg and chocolate chips. Blend until smooth.
3. Add the egg and blend just until mixed in.
4. Fold in the chocolate chips and bake at 300°F for 65 to 70 minutes.
5. Let cool in the pan on a wire rack. Cover and chill for at least 8 hours.
6. Remove the sides of the pan and transfer the cake to a serving platter. Garnish with chocolate curls if desired.
Makes 12 servings. Each serving contains 97 calories, 6.7g protein, 7.9g fat, 27.1g carbs, 36mg cholesterol, 0.8mg iron, 293mg sodium, and 58mg calcium.
